title: AXHierarchyChartNodeContext
description: Context data interface for node template rendering in hierarchy charts, providing access to node properties, expansion state, and interaction functions

types.title: AXHierarchyChartNodeContext
types.description: Context data for node template rendering. This object is passed to the custom node template. The node with expanded state and toggle function is passed as $implicit.

props.name: expanded
props.description: Whether the node is currently expanded

props.name: toggleExpanded
props.description: Function to toggle the expanded state of the node

props.name: value
props.description: Numeric value associated with the node

inherited.name: nativeElement
inherited.description: The root native element. Inherited from NXComponent

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Canonical interface definition from source code
